subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gladdened by the divine fragrances! In this ephemeral dust-heap every nostril shall be perfumed by the breaths of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استبشر بنفحات الله در این خاکدان فانی هر مشامی بانفاس رحمانی معطر گردد
subcodes.subjects: @existence and nonexistence; preexistence, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
